defs: One who, or that which, defends or shields from injury, evil, oppression, etc.; a defender; a guardian; a patron.
quotes: For the world's protector shall be known.

defs: One having the care of the kingdom during the king's minority; a regent.
quotes: Is it concluded he shall be protector !

defs: A cardinal, from one of the more considerable Roman Catholic nations, who looks after the interests of his people at Rome; also, a cardinal who has the same relation to a college, religious order, etc.
